text.title: bun-runtime-simple Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for bun-runtime-simple as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Installing and importing node-fetch in a Bun project.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Redundant — fetch is a global in Bun; importing node-fetch may cause version conflicts.
